title: Project
description: An R&D research project, the unit of governance in RAPai. Carries the WBS primary type (Axis 1) and cross-cutting attributes (Axis 2). Source: ADR-001 R6, ontology/10-project-type-classification-v2.md.

project_id.description: Canonical ULID assigned at kickoff (CONTRACT_SIGNED / AGREEMENT_SIGNED / KICKOFF_APPROVED).

end_date.description: Planned end date. Null for open-ended engagements.

pi_person_id.description: Principal Investigator (or Project Lead for non-academic types).

sponsor.description: Funding/commissioning entity (e.g. 국민청, TIPA, private client).

max_budget.description: Maximum approved budget in KRW. Constraint for project execution. P0 enhancement: Constraints as Properties (R017).

approved_headcount_limit.description: Maximum approved team member count. Constraint for resource planning. P0 enhancement: Constraints as Properties (R017).

mandatory_security_clearance.description: Minimum required security clearance for all team members. Constraint for access control. P0 enhancement: Constraints as Properties (R017).

trl_target.description: Target TRL at project close. Required for types A, B (decision 9).

crl_target.description: Target CRL at project close. Required for type C (decision 9).

current_trl.description: Current TRL level (observed state). Phase III W2-W3: tracks actual progress.

current_crl.description: Current CRL level (observed state). Phase III W2-W3: tracks actual progress.

trl_progression_history.description: Audit trail of TRL level transitions (Phase III W2-W3: R014-R016 tracking).

evidence_artifacts.description: IDs of artifacts/deliverables that evidenced this transition (DefinitionOfDone.required_deliverables).

approved_by.description: Person/Agent who approved the gate submission.

gate_decision_trace_id.description: Link to DecisionTrace from Gate(L1_TRL) approval (R015 audit trail).

crl_progression_history.description: Audit trail of CRL level transitions (similar to trl_progression_history).

then.description: Exploratory type A must declare TRL target (typical range 1–3).
Developmental type B must declare TRL target (typical range 3–7).
Commercialization type C must declare CRL target (typical range 4–9).
